{{ isEditMode ? 'Edit Currency' : 'Add Currency' }}
Auth Active Discard
Currency Name Currency Name is required Only letters and single spaces allowed (minimum 2 characters) Currency Name cannot exceed 50 characters Currency Symbol @if (currencyForm.get('CurrencySymbol')?.invalid && currencyForm.get('CurrencySymbol')?.touched) { Currency Symbol is required } Currency Remark @if (currencyForm.get('CurrencyRemark')?.invalid && currencyForm.get('CurrencyRemark')?.touched) { Currency Remark is required }
